templates.body:
SUPPORT KNOWLEDGE REPO CHARTER
Mission: solve problems before the call
Owners (support eng leads): _______________
In scope: how-tos, help docs, known fixes
Out of scope: scraped third-party copy, secrets, customer PII
Success metric: _______________
Date: _______

CONTRIBUTION GATE
Before publish, author attests:
[ ] Original or properly licensed
[ ] Source listed if adapted
[ ] No word-for-word third-party scrape
[ ] No secrets/PII
Reviewer: _______________  Sample rate: ___%
Block merge without attestation: Y

SALES ENABLE PACK (KB)
Repo URL / pack: _______________
When to give customers: _______________
What not to promise: _______________
Integrity status (gate passed): Y/N
Marketing one-liner: _______________

INTEGRITY INCIDENT
Date found: _______  Article/IDs: _______________
Original source (if known): _______________
Action: [ ] takedown  [ ] rewrite original  [ ] notify counsel if needed
Author handling (HR/process): _______________
Gate fix so it cannot repeat: _______________
Repo program: [ ] continue with gate  [ ] pause  [ ] narrow scope

KB SAMPLE AUDIT ROW
Week: _______  Articles sampled: ___
Pass: ___  Flag: ___  Takedown: ___
Notes: _______________
